subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the call of the Beloved in these days wherein He was cast into the well of hatred by reason of that which the hands of men have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد اسمع ندآء المحبوب فی تلک الایام التی ورد فی بئر البغضا بما اکتسبت ایدی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
